emails.subject: Re: Services Agreement
emails.body: Do you have enovate agreement handy? Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 04/23/2001 08:39 AM From: Travis McCullough@ECT on 04/23/2001 03:20 AM

emails.subject: Re: Services Agreement
emails.body: As a matter of fact, I do have the LLC Agreement for enovate (formerly Midwest Energy Hub, L.L.C.) and the Certo fo Amendment changing the name, etc. Do you want me to bring it up to you? I have a meeting with Ann Elizabeth at 9:00. K- Kay Mann 04/23/2001 08:39 AM

emails.subject: Re: Services Agreement
emails.body: Re: Services Agreement I was kinda hoping you would fill in the blanks.
